hero.title:
Software built

by people who care
hero.description: Codeways is a software development company crafting its own products and partnering with teams to build fast, reliable, beautifully dark interfaces.

products.title: Built by Codeways
products.lead: We don't just build for others — we ship and operate our own software.

flagship.name: Codeways Software
flagship.desc: Our in-house product suite — collaboration, messaging, and developer tooling, built on a single dark design language.

mesh.name: Mesh
mesh.desc: Real-time team messaging and clan collaboration. The engine behind every Codeways product.

forge.name: Forge CI
forge.desc: Build, test, and ship pipelines for fast-moving product teams. Deploys in seconds, not minutes.

engineering.title: Product engineering
engineering.desc: Web & backend systems built to scale, from prototype to production.

mobile.title: Mobile development
mobile.desc: Native-feeling iOS & Android apps that share one codebase.

cloud.title: Cloud & DevOps
cloud.desc: Infrastructure, CI/CD and observability that keeps products up.

ai.title: AI integration
ai.desc: LLM features and automation woven into real product workflows.

cta.title: Have a product in mind?
cta.desc: Tell us what you're building — we'll bring the engineering.
